---
title: "RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression"
chapter_id: "rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression"
part_id: "routing-compression-evidence-implementation"
status: "conceptual"
last_updated: "2026-06-24"
primary_sources:
  - "rankfold_neuralfold"
  - "rankfold_compressor"
  - "bbvca_v9"
  - "cgs"
  - "bugbrain"
evidence_level: "argument"
claim_label: "Design rationale"
open_evidence_gaps:
  - "Assigned source texts have not yet been ingested or summarized."
  - "No Codex tests have been implemented or run."
  - "Chapter prose is a scaffold, not a completed manuscript draft."
---

# RankFold, NeuralFold, and Artifact Compression

## Chapter status

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Chapter ID | `rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression` |
| Part | Part III - Routing, Compression, Evidence, and Implementation |
| Status | conceptual |
| Last updated | 2026-06-24 |
| Primary source records | `rankfold_neuralfold`, `rankfold_compressor`, `bbvca_v9`, `cgs`, `bugbrain` |
| Claim label | Design rationale |
| Evidence level | argument |
| Source ingestion state | Source records assigned; source texts not yet ingested. |
| Test state | Planned only; no tests have been run. |

## Drafting guardrail

This stub is derived from `book_structure.json` and the source inventory only. It does not claim that the listed source documents have been ingested, summarized, or independently verified.

## Problem

The stack needs artifact-level and tensor-level compression strategies that remain honest about residuals and utility.

## Why existing approaches are insufficient

Storage savings are not enough if compressed artifacts lose semantics, break downstream use, or require expensive fallback too often.

## Core Claim

[rankfold-neuralfold-and-artifact-compression.core, label: Design rationale, support: argument] RankFold/NeuralFold-style artifact compression belongs as a bounded implementation hypothesis with probe-route fallback and residual coding.

## Mechanism

- Use low-rank residual coding or functional preprocessing where appropriate.
- Probe compressed artifacts before use.
- Route to full artifacts when probes fail.

## Interfaces

- Artifact graph stores compressed and full references.
- Routing selects representation by task.
- Evidence records latency, ratio, and utility.

## Invariants

- Fallback path is known.
- Residual coding is measured.
- Downstream utility is tested.

## Failure modes

- Compression damaging rare critical cases.
- Probe not representative.
- Latency gains erased by fallback.

## Minimal implementation

A compressed artifact record with ratio, residual, probe, fallback, and utility fields.

## Codex test plan

| Test | Purpose | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Compression ratio test | Support or falsify this chapter's layer claim. | planned; not run |
| Probe-route fallback test | Support or falsify this chapter's layer claim. | planned; not run |
| Downstream utility preservation test | Support or falsify this chapter's layer claim. | planned; not run |

## Source crosswalk

| Source ID | Title | Planned use |
|---|---|---|
| `rankfold_neuralfold` | RankFold + NeuralFold | Planned use from inventory/manifest: Tensor/artifact compression. Low-rank residual coding plus functional preprocessing and probe-route fallback. |
| `rankfold_compressor` | rankFold compressor | Planned use from inventory/manifest: Alternate RankFold/NeuralFold source. |
| `bbvca_v9` | BBVCA_v9_final_public_release | Planned use from inventory/manifest: Prefer v9. Generate-verify-repair compression from seeded local laws, bounded search, two-phase rate discipline. |
| `cgs` | Compact Generative Systems | Planned use from inventory/manifest: Smallest adequate structure that can generate/govern target without hiding residual complexity. |
| `bugbrain` | BugBrain | Planned use from inventory/manifest: Edge/resource-aware implementation context. |

## Summary

This chapter currently establishes the structural slot for this layer of the ASI stack. The next drafting pass should ingest assigned sources, separate source-derived claims from design hypotheses, and update Appendix C when support states change.
